$comment: Static IntelliSense model for delegate fragments (FR-22), hand-maintained against features/done/web-ui/spec.md §6.2 which mirrors fallen-8-core/Model/AGraphElementModel.cs, VertexModel.cs, EdgeModel.cs. Regeneration: update this file whenever those public surfaces change; the spec section is the review checklist. Only members a fragment can meaningfully touch are listed.

members.name: Id
members.doc: The graph element id (unique per instance).

members.name: GetPropertyCount
members.doc: Number of properties on this element.

members.name: GetAllProperties
members.doc: All properties as an immutable dictionary.

members.name: TryGetProperty
members.signature: bool TryGetProperty<T>(out T result, string propertyId)
members.doc: The canonical typed property access: returns false when the property is missing or not a T. Example: TryGetProperty(out int age, "age") && age > 30

members.name: OutEdges
members.doc: Outgoing edges grouped by edge-property id.

members.name: InEdges
members.doc: Incoming edges grouped by edge-property id.

members.name: TryGetOutEdge
members.signature: bool TryGetOutEdge(out IReadOnlyList<EdgeModel> result, string edgePropertyId)
members.doc: Outgoing edges for one edge-property id.

members.name: TryGetInEdge
members.signature: bool TryGetInEdge(out IReadOnlyList<EdgeModel> result, string edgePropertyId)
members.doc: Incoming edges for one edge-property id.

members.name: EdgePropertyId
members.doc: The edge-property id this edge belongs to.
